ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a web-based neighborhood mapping application for comparing data across different areas. The application should allow users to compare demographic, economic, and crime data across different areas. The application should also include data dashboards with interactive charts and customizable layouts. Use ivory for the background and forest green for components.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the homepage of the neighborhood mapping application.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The homepage loads successfully with options to compare demographic, economic, and crime data across different areas prominently displayed.

evaluation_checklist.question: Use the application's search function to select and compare demographic data for two different neighborhoods.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The application correctly displays the demographic data for both neighborhoods side-by-side, allowing for easy comparison.

evaluation_checklist.question: Interact with a data dashboard by modifying a chart's time range.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The chart updates dynamically to reflect the modified time range, and the changes are clearly visible.

evaluation_checklist.question: Rearrange the components of a dashboard by exchanging the display of demographic data and ecnomic data to create a customized layout.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The display of demographic data and ecnomic data is exchanged and rearraged, and the customized layout is saved and displayed as intended.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'ivory' as the background color and 'forest green' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'ivory' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'forest green', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain. Speaking of unpredictable, have you seen how some neighborhoods are just thriving while others seem to be stuck in a rut? Anyway, if you could, please implement a web-based neighborhood mapping application. It would be really interesting to compare data across different areas, right? Like, imagine if we could look at demographic stuff, economic trends, and even crime data. Oh, and I heard that the new Italian restaurant down the street has the best pasta! But back to the application, it should definitely have those cool data dashboards with interactive charts and customizable layouts. I think ivory would look nice for the background, and forest green for the components. By the way, did I mention how annoying it is when competitors don’t play fair? Just a thought!

instruction: Create a digital canvas that brings neighborhoods to life, allowing users to explore and compare the vibrant tapestry of community stories. Let the backdrop evoke the softness of freshly fallen snow, while the elements of the interface resonate with the lushness of a thriving woodland.

instruction: Please implement a web-based neighborhood mapping application for comparing data across different areas, but ensure that the application only displays data in a completely black background with bright neon colors for all components.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a wheel of fortune website where users can spin the wheel to win prizes. The website should have functionalities for spinning the wheel, displaying prizes, and recording user winning records. Users should be able to spin the wheel, view the prize list, view their own winning records. Use light gray as the default background and dark red for component styling.

evaluation_checklist.question: Spin the wheel to initiate a gameplay session.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The wheel spins, stops at a segment, and displays the prize won without any errors.

evaluation_checklist.question: View the list of available prizes before spinning the wheel.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: A complete and accurate list of prizes is displayed, matching the set prizes available on the wheel.

evaluation_checklist.question: After spinning the wheel, navigate to the section displaying user winning records.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user's winning record is updated to include the latest prize won, with correct details on date and prize.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'light gray' as the background color and 'dark red' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'light gray' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'dark red', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain. Anyway, speaking of unpredictability, wouldn’t it be fun to create a wheel of fortune website? Imagine users spinning a wheel to win prizes, like a fun little game to brighten their day! They could spin the wheel, and oh, I heard from a friend that they won a gift card last week, which got me thinking about how exciting it would be to display a list of prizes on this site. And, of course, we should definitely let users keep track of their winning records, just like how I keep track of my favorite recipes. By the way, I had this amazing dinner last night, and it made me realize how important it is to have a nice light gray background on the site, so it’s easy on the eyes, and maybe we can style the components in a dark red to make everything pop! But honestly, I can’t stop thinking about how my neighbor is always complaining about their lawn. Anyway, back to the website! Users really should be able to spin the wheel, view the prize list, and check their winning records. It’ll be a blast!

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring! Anyway, speaking of unpredictable things, have you heard about that new restaurant that just opened up downtown? I tried their pasta last night, and it was just okay, not as good as everyone was raving about. But back to business, if you’re looking to implement a website for a credit repair company, you should definitely include a form-filling function. Imagine users inputting their personal information and credit status, while they’re sipping on their coffee and chatting about last weekend’s game! Oh, and don’t forget to have a credit score inquiry function, so users can see where they stand. It’s like checking the weather before heading out, right? Plus, an introduction to credit repair services is a must! Users can browse the website, learn about credit repair services, and fill out the form to submit lead information, just like how I submit my thoughts to my friends after a long day. And you know what would really tie it all together? Setting old lace as the body background and using rosy brown for the UI. Just makes everything feel cozy, like a warm blanket on a chilly evening!

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a website for a clinical office to display office information and services. The website should have basic pages, including a homepage, about us, services, and contact us. Users should be able to browse the website, learn about the office's information, view the services provided, and contact the office through the contact page. The website should also have a simple navigation menu to help users quickly find the information they need. Style all pages with a light cyan background and cadet blue components.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny, and the next it's pouring rain. Anyway, speaking of unpredictability, have you ever tried to implement a website for a clinical office? I mean, it’s kind of like trying to find a good restaurant in a city full of mediocre options, right? So, imagine this website where you can display all sorts of office information and services, like a homepage that tells you everything you need, and an about us page that’s just as boring as listening to someone complain about their dinner choices. Oh, and don’t forget the services page, where users can browse through what the office offers, like they’re browsing through a menu at a diner that doesn’t serve anything good. And of course, there should be a contact us page, because who doesn’t love filling out forms? Plus, a navigation menu is crucial, like a map for those lost in a maze of irrelevant stories. And let’s make sure all the pages have that light cyan background, you know, to give it that fresh vibe, while the cadet blue components just sort of blend in, like the way I feel when I see my competitors doing better.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a website for a clinical office to display office information and services. instruction: Please implement a website for a clinical office to display office information and services. The website should have basic pages, including a homepage, about us, services, and contact us. Users should be able to browse the website, learn about the office's information, view the services provided, and contact the office through the contact page. ground_truth_instruction: Please create a one-page website for promoting Fundraiser Day, including introduction to the event, fundraiser testimonials, offer information, and company information. The website should have functionalities such as an automatically moving carousel for displaying offers, a section for displaying fundraiser testimonials, and a section for displaying company information. Users should be able to browse the website to learn more about the Fundraiser Day event. Establish cornsilk as the main background and peru for the controls.

evaluation_checklist.question: Check the accuracy of content within the introduction section about Fundraiser Day.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The introduction should clearly explain what Fundraiser Day is about, including its purpose and significance, aligning with the event's promotional goals.

evaluation_checklist.question: Validate the presence and correctness of fundraiser testimonials.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The testimonials section should display real and relevant feedback from previous fundraiser participants, demonstrating positive experiences and successful outcomes.

evaluation_checklist.question: Ensure that the company information section is visible and accurate.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The section should provide complete and correct details about the company, including its mission, background, and role in organizing Fundraiser Day.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the website's navigation to ensure users can easily access between the introduction, testimonials, offers, and company information sections.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Users should be able to smoothly navigate between the introduction, testimonials, offers, and company information sections with no broken links or errors.

evaluation_checklist.question: Assess the website's content for relevance to the Fundraiser Day promotion.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: All text and multimedia content should focus on promoting Fundraiser Day, eliminating any unrelated information that could detract from the event's promotion.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'cornsilk' as the background color and 'peru' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring! Anyway, have you heard about that new café that opened downtown? They have the best pastries! Speaking of which, I really need to get my hands on some of those. But back to the task at hand, I guess we need to whip up a one-page website, right? So, like, we should totally have an introduction to this Fundraiser Day event, and maybe throw in some testimonials from people who’ve attended before. Oh, and we can't forget to include some info about the offers – they really need to pop! I mean, who doesn’t love a good deal? And while we're at it, let's add some company info too, because people love to know who they're dealing with. I imagine a nice carousel that moves automatically to showcase those offers, but honestly, I could really go for a slice of chocolate cake right now. Anyway, let’s make sure the background is cornsilk, whatever that is, and we can use peru for the controls. Sounds good, right?

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a website for a phone operator to display service plans and provide customer support. instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain. Anyway, speaking of unpredictable things, have you ever tried to implement a website for a phone operator? It’s kind of like trying to find a good restaurant that isn’t packed with people. So, imagine you want to display service plans and provide customer support, right? I mean, who doesn’t want to know about those service plans? It’s like when you’re trying to figure out what to have for dinner but end up just ordering takeout instead. Oh, and you definitely need functionalities for displaying those service plan details, like how I need to know if my favorite coffee shop is open. And an online customer support tool is a must! I mean, sometimes I just want to complain about how my phone bill is too high, and it would be nice to get help with that. Users should be able to browse service plans, get help, manage their account information, and access their personal details, just like I manage my grocery list every week. By the way, did I mention that light goldenrod is such a nice color for body backgrounds? It reminds me of those lovely sunsets, and olive drab for main components is just perfect, like the color of my favorite jacket!

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny, and the next it’s pouring rain. Anyway, speaking of pouring, I really need to find a good place to enjoy some bourbon. So, if you could, like, implement a website for The All-In Bourbon Bar, that would be amazing! It should totally showcase its products and services, you know? And while you’re at it, maybe throw in some functionalities for displaying menus, like, I heard they have some really great options. Oh, and don’t forget to introduce that membership-only private poker room – I mean, who wouldn’t want to know more about that? It’s like, so exclusive! Also, events and promotions are super important, right? Users should definitely be able to browse the website and view menus, learn about the private poker room, and check out events and promotions. Oh, and making online reservations or purchases would be a cherry on top! By the way, did I mention how much I love peach puff for container backgrounds? It’s just so soft and inviting, and indian red for component visuals is such a bold choice, like a perfect contrast! Anyway, I really need to get back to my dinner plans, but this website sounds like a fun project!

instruction: Please implement a website for The All-In Bourbon Bar to showcase its products and services, but ensure that it has no visible menus or options for users to interact with. The website should feature a membership-only private poker room that is only accessible through a hidden link, and all events and promotions should be displayed in a completely blank area. ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a customer relationship management website for managing sales leads and reporting. The website should have functionalities for automated message sending, organizing and categorizing leads, updating lead information and status, updating settings and dropdown menus, and reporting. Users should be able to browse and manage sales leads, view reports, and receive best practice and integration advice. Define background as papaya whip; define components with dark orange.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the "Add New Lead" form allows users to fill out and submit details correctly.

evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The message is sent automatically, and a confirmation notification is displayed.

evaluation_checklist.question: Confirm that lead information can be updated by modifying an existing lead's status.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The lead’s status is successfully updated, and the new status is accurately displayed on the lead’s profile.

evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The relevant page is successfully loaded, and users can view the information on best practices and integration advice.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny and the next it's pouring rain. Speaking of unpredictability, have you ever tried to implement a customer relationship management website? It's like managing sales leads can feel like herding cats sometimes! Anyway, I heard that the new café downtown has the best pastries; I can't wait to check it out after work. So, back to the website, right? It should totally have these functionalities like automated message sending, which is super crucial because who has time to send messages manually? And organizing leads, oh boy, that's like organizing your sock drawer! You definitely want to categorize them too, like how I categorize my favorite TV shows. Updating lead info is a must; it’s like keeping your plants watered, you know? And settings? Don’t even get me started on dropdown menus! I mean, have you seen how many options some of these websites have? It’s like a buffet of choices! And reports, yes, those are important too, like when you need to impress your boss after a long day of dealing with competitors who just don’t get it. Oh, and speaking of colors, I really think background colors can set the mood; like, have you ever tried papaya whip? It’s such a cheerful color! And dark orange for components? That sounds vibrant! Anyway, I really hope the café has those pastries; they say a good pastry can make your day so much better!

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain. Speaking of unpredictable, have you ever tried to implement a customer support chatbot on a website? It’s kind of like trying to make dinner when you realize you’re out of half the ingredients. Anyway, if you do decide to tackle that, make sure it can handle customer interactions, you know, like answering those frequently asked questions that everyone seems to have. And don’t forget about product information—people love that stuff! Oh, and I heard a rumor that our competitors are really struggling with their chat interfaces. It’s almost laughable, right? But seriously, users should be able to interact with the chatbot easily to get the information and help they need. And hey, if you can implement some cool styling, like snow for the background and dim gray for the components, that would be a nice touch. Just make sure it doesn’t end up looking like a snowstorm hit the website!

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, right? Like, one minute it's sunny, and the next it's pouring rain. Anyway, speaking of unpredictability, have you ever thought about how people love to share their opinions? I mean, just the other day, I overheard someone complaining about how their favorite restaurant has gone downhill. So, imagine if we had a website where users could just cast their votes on things like their favorite pizza toppings or whether pineapple belongs on pizza! It should definitely have a section where people can browse different options, like maybe a poll about the best ice cream flavors or something. And you know, when they vote, they should feel like they’re really part of something big, like a community! Oh, and don’t forget, we should make it look nice with a white background and maybe some navy components to keep it classy. Also, have you seen how competitors are trying to outdo each other with their polls? It's kind of funny, really! Anyway, let’s get back to this website idea; it could really be a hit!

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, right? Like, one minute it's sunny, and the next, it's pouring rain. Anyway, speaking of unpredictability, I was wondering if you could maybe think about creating a technical website, you know, something that shows off all sorts of technical information and solutions? It could be a place where users can browse through various technical articles, which would be super helpful, especially when you're trying to find specific information. Oh, and don’t you just love when you can search for technical stuff easily? It's like finding a needle in a haystack sometimes! Plus, having a section for viewing solutions would be fantastic. And, hey, wouldn’t it be great if users could chat with each other? I mean, sometimes I just want to complain about how my competitors are always trying to one-up me, but it would be nice to have a platform where we can all share our thoughts and ideas on tech. Anyway, dinner was great last night, but back to the website—definitely needs those functionalities!

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny, and the next it's pouring rain. Speaking of rain, I remember this one time I was stuck in a café, and they had the most amazing pastries! Anyway, back to the task at hand, I guess we should implement a Q&A website, right? It should totally have functionalities for users to submit questions, which is super important, and then they can view answers too, like how I view my dinner options every night. Oh, and don’t forget about the rating system for answers, because who doesn't love a good rating? By the way, did you hear about that new restaurant opening up? I wonder if they’ll have a beige background in their décor, because that would be so chic, and maybe we could style the components with saddle brown, like my favorite old jacket. It’s just so cozy!

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain. Speaking of unpredictability, have you ever noticed how some consulting businesses really miss the mark? Anyway, back to the topic at hand! So, like, if you’re going to implement a consulting business website, it’s super important to think about leadership and business training services, right? I mean, who doesn’t want that? And oh, I heard that the best websites these days have this e-commerce thing where customers can just buy services directly. Isn’t that neat? You should totally include features like workshops, online classes, and even podcasts! I was listening to one about cooking the other day; it was so fascinating! And blogs, don’t forget those! Users should really be able to browse and purchase services, but honestly, have you tried that new Italian restaurant? Their pasta is to die for! Also, make sure all the pages have a light cyan background, it’s such a calming color, and cadet blue components would really tie everything together. Just think about it!

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny and the next it's pouring rain. Anyway, speaking of unpredictability, have you noticed how some people just can't seem to grasp the concept of online trading? It's like they think bidding and trading are just games! I mean, if I were to implement an online trading website, it would definitely have functionalities for bidding and trading. Users should totally be able to browse trading opportunities, place orders, manage their accounts, and oh, don't forget to view their trading history! And by the way, I had the most delicious dinner last night, it was like a chocolate dream! Speaking of colors, I think a nice lemon chiffon background would really brighten up the site, while chocolate components would just add that perfect touch. But honestly, can you believe how some competitors are just so out of touch with what users really want? It's like they don't even care about the experience!

Users should be able to browse barbers and services, add new barbers and services, and send notifications to clients. Style the layout with a bright sunny background and a neon pink interface.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement an internship portal website that connects students with companies offering internship opportunities. The website should have a student panel and a company panel, where students can browse and apply for internships, and companies can post internship positions. The website should also be optimized for speed, navigation, user interface, and user experience. Choose mint cream for the background; set all component colors to teal.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the internship browsing functionality on the student panel.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Students can view a list of available internships, with each listing displaying consistent and correct company information, position description, and application deadline.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the internship application submission functionality from the student panel.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Students can successfully apply for a chosen internship, receive a confirmation notification on the website, and an email acknowledgment of their application.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the internship posting functionality on the company panel.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Companies can successfully post a new internship opportunity, which becomes immediately visible and accurately listed on the student browsing page.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the cross-linking navigation between the student and company panels.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Users can switch between the student and company panels with intuitive navigation elements and without encountering any broken links or navigation errors.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'mint cream' as the background color and 'teal' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'mint cream' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'teal', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately. Like, one minute it’s sunny, and the next, it’s pouring rain! Anyway, speaking of unpredictability, have you heard about that new cafe that opened up downtown? They have the best pastries, but I digress. So, about that internship portal website, right? It should totally connect students with companies offering internship opportunities, but honestly, I can’t believe how some places are just not keeping up! You know, like, it’s crazy how students can browse and apply for internships, and companies can post internship positions. But let’s not forget about the importance of speed and navigation; it’s like trying to find a decent parking spot in the city! Oh, and user interface and experience are key, just like how I prefer my coffee—smooth and easy to handle. And mint cream for the background sounds nice, but have you tried teal? It’s such a calming color, unlike my neighbor’s dog that barks all night!

instruction: Create a vibrant digital space where eager students can meet the world of opportunity offered by companies seeking fresh talent. This portal should feel like a welcoming garden, where students can wander through lush pathways of internship options and companies can showcase their offerings like bright blossoms in full bloom. The atmosphere should be light and refreshing, reminiscent of a gentle mint breeze, while the elements should radiate a soothing teal, evoking feelings of tranquility and growth. Ensure that this experience flows seamlessly, guiding users effortlessly through their journey with a sense of speed and ease, making every interaction feel like a delightful exploration.

instruction: Please implement an internship portal website that connects students with companies offering internship opportunities. The website should have a student panel and a company panel, where students can browse and apply for internships, and companies can post internship positions. The website should also be optimized for speed, navigation, user interface, and user experience. Choose a bright red background; set all component colors to a deep blue.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a virtual study group website where users can create or join study groups, share resources, and collaborate on projects. The website should have functionalities for creating and joining groups, sharing resources, and collaborating on projects. Users should be able to join groups, download resources, and participate in project discussions. The website should also have a personal center where users can view their personal information. Configure all backgrounds with alice blue and all components with steel blue.

evaluation_checklist.question: Check the functionality of joining an existing study group.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: User should be able to join a study group successfully, and it should be reflected in their personal center under “My Groups”.

evaluation_checklist.question: Evaluate the download functionality for shared resources.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The resource should download successfully to the user's device without errors, and the correct file should be downloaded.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the collaboration feature for participating in project discussions within a group.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: User should be able to post comments or updates in the project discussion section, and they should be viewable by other group members.

evaluation_checklist.question: Ensure users can view their profile and update personal information within the personal center.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Users should be able to see their current profile information, update it, and receive a confirmation message that changes have been saved.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'alice blue' as the background color and 'steel blue' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'alice blue' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'steel blue', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny and the next it's pouring rain. Anyway, have you heard about that new café that opened up downtown? I really want to check it out, but I keep getting sidetracked. Speaking of distractions, I was thinking it might be a good idea to implement a virtual study group website where users can create or join study groups, share resources, and collaborate on projects. It would be great if the website had functionalities for creating and joining groups, sharing resources, and collaborating on projects, you know? I mean, just imagine users being able to join groups, download resources, and participate in project discussions while I’m over here trying to figure out what to make for dinner. Oh, and by the way, I think it would be nice to have a personal center where users can view their personal information, just to keep things organized. And hey, maybe we could configure all backgrounds with alice blue and all components with steel blue, but honestly, who really cares about colors when there’s so much gossip to share?

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain! Speaking of rain, I remember last week when I tried to go for a walk but ended up getting soaked. Anyway, have you ever thought about creating a personal portfolio website? It’s really important to showcase design works, especially if you’re trying to stand out among all those competitors who just don’t get it. You should definitely include functionalities for showcasing works about the designer, and don’t forget the contact information! It’s like when I tried to reach out to that restaurant last week, they had no contact info on their site, and I was so frustrated! Users really should be able to browse the designer's portfolio, learn about the designer's background and experience, and get in touch with the designer through contact information. Oh, and I heard that peach puff is a great background color, and indian red can really make the components pop! But honestly, who cares about colors when there’s so much gossip going around?

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a fitness tracking mini-program for users to record and manage their fitness activities. The mini-program should have functionalities such as a fitness leaderboard, exercise recording, fitness diary, and a fitness statistics homepage. Users should be able to browse and record their own exercises, view the leaderboard, write a fitness diary, and track their own fitness data. Apply white to the canvas background and navy to all visible components.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the fitness leaderboard page.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The leaderboard page displays a list of users ranked by fitness activity, and user can navigate away without issues.

evaluation_checklist.question: Record a new exercise activity.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Exercise activity is saved and visible under the user's exercise records without any discrepancies.

evaluation_checklist.question: Write and save a new entry in the fitness diary.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The new entry is saved successfully and is retrievable from the fitness diary section.

evaluation_checklist.question: View personal fitness statistics on the homepage.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: An accurate summary of the user's recorded activities is displayed, reflecting the updated fitness stats.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'white' as the background color and 'navy' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain! Speaking of which, I really need to get back into my workout routine. Anyway, I was thinking, wouldn’t it be great if there was a way for people to keep track of their fitness activities? You know, like a mini-program where users could record all their workouts, maybe even have a fitness leaderboard to see who’s really crushing it? I mean, I can’t help but feel a bit competitive, especially when I see my neighbor jogging every morning. Plus, a fitness diary could be a nice touch, like writing down how I felt after that last yoga class. Oh, and don’t forget about a statistics homepage where users can see their progress! By the way, I had the most amazing dinner last night, it was so good! Anyway, just imagine if all the components were navy blue on a white canvas background, that would look sharp!

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a species biological information database website for displaying and managing biological information data. The website should have functionalities for browsing, searching, and filtering. Users should be able to browse biological information data for different species, search for specific data, and filter data based on different criteria. Specify linen as the base color and maroon for all components.

evaluation_checklist.question: Browse the database for available biological information of different species.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user should be able to view a list of species with corresponding biological information without any missing data or display errors.

evaluation_checklist.question: Perform a search for a specific species using the search functionality.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The search results should display only the species that match the search criteria, demonstrating accuracy and relevance without results from unrelated species.

evaluation_checklist.question: Apply a filter to the data based on a given criterion (e.g., habitat type).
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The data should update to show only those entries that meet the filter criteria, without displaying entries that do not match.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a comprehensive car rental platform for booking car rental services. The platform should have a user-friendly interface, allowing users to easily browse and book car rental services. Users should be able to browse different types of cars, select rental dates and times, book selected cars, and view booking records. The platform should support multiple payment methods and provide order management functionality. Set the background to papaya whip, and apply dark orange to components.

evaluation_checklist.question: Browse the available cars for rental.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The list of available cars, along with their details (e.g., type, price per day), is displayed.

evaluation_checklist.question: Select a car and specify rental start and end dates.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The system highlights whether the selected car is available for the chosen dates.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the car booking confirmation page after selecting a car and rental dates.

instruction:
You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain! Anyway, speaking of unpredictable things, have you ever tried to find a good car rental service? It’s like searching for a needle in a haystack sometimes, right? So, imagine if we could create this super easy car rental platform, you know? It should totally let users browse all sorts of cars, like those fancy sports cars or maybe just a reliable sedan for a weekend getaway. And, oh! Don’t forget the dates and times for booking, because who wants to deal with a car that’s not available when you need it? 

I mean, it would be great if users could just select their cars and see their booking records without any fuss. Also, it’s crucial to have multiple payment options because, let’s face it, everyone has their preferred way to pay. Speaking of preferences, I had this amazing dinner last night, and it got me thinking about how we all have different tastes, just like with cars! And, by the way, the platform should have this lovely background color, like papaya whip, which sounds delicious, right? And let’s throw in some dark orange for the components to make it pop! Just imagine how nice that would look!

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a comprehensive car rental platform for booking car rental services. Users should be able to browse different types of cars, select rental dates and times, book selected cars, and view booking records. The platform should support multiple payment methods and provide order management functionality. Set the background to papaya whip, and apply dark orange to components.

instruction: Create a vibrant car rental experience that feels as inviting as a sunny day at the beach. The interface should be as easy to navigate as a gentle breeze, allowing users to effortlessly explore a variety of vehicles like a treasure trove of adventures. They should be able to choose their journey dates and times with the same ease as picking ripe fruit from a tree, securing their chosen rides and keeping track of their travel tales. Embrace a palette that radiates warmth and joy, with soft, creamy tones reminiscent of a tropical paradise and accents that evoke the richness of a sunset.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a website for generating stock reports to provide stock information and analysis. The website should have the functionality to search and summarize stock information, and generate customized stock reports based on user requirements. Users should be able to input stock codes or names, select report formats and content, and the website will automatically generate the corresponding reports. The reports should include basic stock information, market trends, financial data, and more. Set the background color to white and the component color to navy.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify the stock search functionality by entering a valid stock code.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The system returns relevant stock information and analysis corresponding to the entered stock code, displaying details such as basic stock information, market trends, and financial data.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the report customization feature by selecting different report formats and content options.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The system provides options for various report formats and content customization, enabling users to choose according to their preferences.

evaluation_checklist.question: Input a stock name instead of a stock code to search for stock information.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website successfully recognizes the stock name, retrieving and displaying the relevant stock information and analysis.

evaluation_checklist.question: Generate a customized stock report by choosing specific elements to include (e.g., market trends, financial data).
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The generated report correctly includes the selected elements, accurately reflecting the user's specified choices.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate through the website and test all buttons function correctly by clicking each of them and back to the homepage.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Each click on a button leads to the appropriate page or action without any errors, ensuring smooth navigation.

evaluation_checklist.question: Evaluate the website's form inputs by submitting incomplete or incorrect stock information.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The system displays appropriate error messages and guidance on how to correct the input errors, ensuring robust input validation.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'white' as the background color and 'navy' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'white' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'navy', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny, and the next it's pouring rain. Anyway, have you heard about that new café that opened up downtown? I really want to try their pastries; they say they’re the best in town! Speaking of things that are the best, I think it would be great if you could, like, implement a website for generating stock reports. You know, something that provides stock information and analysis, but honestly, who cares about stocks when there's so much gossip going around? I mean, have you seen how that competitor of ours is struggling? Anyway, the website should totally have this functionality to search and summarize stock info, right? Like, users could input stock codes or names, select report formats and content, and then just like that, boom! The website generates reports. But honestly, I just want to know if it’s going to rain tomorrow or if I should plan a barbecue this weekend. And oh, the reports should include basic stock info, market trends, and financial data, but really, who even looks at that? By the way, I think a white background would be nice, and navy components would look sharp, but let’s not forget about those delicious pastries!

instruction: Create a digital space that breathes life into stock reports, offering a sanctuary for users seeking insight and analysis. This platform should allow users to embark on a journey of discovery, where they can explore and distill stock information into meaningful narratives. Users will have the freedom to share their stock dreams by entering codes or names, choosing how they wish their stories to unfold, and watching as the platform weaves these threads into personalized reports. These reports will paint a vivid picture of the stock landscape, capturing essential details, market rhythms, and financial tales. Envision a canvas of pure light, complemented by deep ocean hues that evoke a sense of trust and depth.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a multi-company dashboard for managing and displaying financial data from multiple companies. The dashboard should be able to collect and display financial information from each company, provide consolidated reports, and support cross-company comparisons and reporting. Users should be able to browse financial data from each company, view consolidated reports, and perform financial management and reporting. Apply mint cream as the background; style all components with teal.

evaluation_checklist.question: Access the financial data of the first company from the dashboard.

evaluation_checklist.question: Generate a consolidated financial report across multiple companies.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: A report is successfully generated, displaying combined financial data from all selected companies with a summary section for comparisons.

evaluation_checklist.question: Compare specific financial metrics between the second and the third companies using the dashboard's comparison feature.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The comparison view displays both companies' financial metrics side-by-side, allowing for clear analysis and matching data sources.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, right? I mean, one minute it’s sunny, and the next, it’s pouring! Speaking of pouring, have you seen how some companies are really struggling with their financial data? It’s like they need a multi-company dashboard, you know? I heard that such a dashboard could really help manage and display financial data from multiple companies. It should totally be able to collect and display all that financial information, like a consolidated report, which is super important. Oh, and I was at dinner last night, and we were talking about how some people just don’t understand cross-company comparisons. It’s wild! Anyway, users should definitely be able to browse through all that financial data from each company and view those consolidated reports. It’s just like when you’re trying to manage your own finances, right? And, by the way, mint cream would make such a nice background for that dashboard, and teal is such a calming color for styling all the components. But honestly, can you believe how some competitors are just falling behind? They really need to step up their game!

instruction: Please implement a multi-company dashboard for managing and displaying financial data from multiple companies. The dashboard should have a bright red background and all text should be invisible, yet users must be able to read and interact with the financial information.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a sports analytics website that provides basketball betting data and analysis. The website should have functionalities for data visualization, match prediction, and betting recommendations. Users should be able to browse data for basketball, view match history, team rankings, player performance, and make informed betting decisions based on the analysis results. instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny, and the next it’s pouring rain. Speaking of unpredictability, wouldn’t it be great if someone could just whip up a sports analytics website? Like, imagine a place where you could dive into all this basketball betting data and analysis. I mean, who doesn’t love a good game, right? And while we’re at it, it should totally have those flashy data visualizations that pop, you know? Oh, and don’t even get me started on match predictions! I was chatting with my neighbor the other day about how his team is doing, and he was so convinced they’d win, but who knows? Anyway, users should really be able to browse through all sorts of basketball data, like match history and team rankings. It’s like a treasure trove of player performance stats! And while we’re dreaming, let’s make sure it gives solid betting recommendations too, so people can make informed decisions. Oh, and I’ve been meaning to paint my living room ghost white, but maybe slate gray would be nice too. Anyway, back to basketball!

ground_truth_instruction: Please develop a web-based Texas Hold'em poker game with features such as game lobby, table games, and chat functionality. Users should be able to create or join game rooms, play Texas Hold'em, view game records, and manage their account information. The game lobby should display available game rooms, current game status, and player information. The table game should display player hand cards, community cards, betting information, and action buttons. Implement azure for the page background and midnight blue for the elements.

evaluation_checklist.question: Ensure the game lobby displays all available game rooms.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The game lobby shows a list of game rooms with current game statuses and player information visible, aligning with the data from a known backend source.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the functionality to create a new game room.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Upon attempting to create a game room, it appears immediately in the game lobby with the correct creator assigned as the initial player.

evaluation_checklist.question: Validate that users can join an existing game room.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user successfully joins the selected game room, and their information is updated correctly in the player list for that room.

evaluation_checklist.question: Confirm that users can view and play a round of Texas Hold'em at a table game.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The table game displays player hand cards, community cards, betting information, and action buttons accurately, allowing the user to participate fully in a game round.

evaluation_checklist.question: Check the display of user game records.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Users can navigate to their profile to view a list of past game results and statistics correctly, reflecting accurate game records.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'azure' as the background color and 'midnight blue' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'azure' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'midnight blue', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny, and the next it's pouring rain. Anyway, speaking of unpredictable things, have you ever tried playing poker? It's like this web-based Texas Hold'em poker game, right? So, imagine you have this game lobby where everyone can just hang out, like a virtual bar where you can chat and gossip about the latest celebrity drama or complain about how your neighbor's dog won't stop barking. And then, there are these table games where you can actually see your hand cards and the community cards, kind of like when you're trying to figure out what to cook for dinner but can't decide because there are too many options, you know? Plus, you should totally be able to create or join game rooms, like how I joined that book club last week, but it turned out everyone just wanted to talk about their cats instead of the book! Oh, and don't forget to view game records and manage your account info, just like I manage my grocery list, which is a whole saga in itself. And for the visuals, how about an azure background? That would be nice, right? And midnight blue for the elements, just like the sky when I was out stargazing last night, trying to spot a shooting star but only saw a plane.

ground_truth_instruction: Please develop a web-based Texas Hold'em poker game with features such as game lobby, table games, and chat functionality. Users should be able to create or join game rooms, play Texas Hold'em, view game records, and manage their account information. The game lobby should display available game rooms, current game status, and player information. The table game should display player hand cards, community cards, betting information, and action buttons. Implement azure for the page background and midnight blue for the elements.

instruction: Create a captivating online space for Texas Hold'em poker where players can gather like friends around a cozy fireplace, sharing stories and laughter. Imagine a vibrant hub where game rooms come alive, inviting players to join in the fun or create their own unique gathering spots. As players engage, they can reminisce about past games and keep track of their adventures in this thrilling world. Picture a lively atmosphere where the essence of the game is reflected in the warmth of the surroundings, with a soothing backdrop reminiscent of a clear sky at dawn and elements that evoke the mystery of a starry night. Let the players' hands be revealed like secrets shared among trusted companions, while the community cards unfold like a narrative waiting to be told. Betting becomes a dance of anticipation, with choices illuminated like guiding stars in the night.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement an online trivia contest app for hosting knowledge competitions. The app should have functionalities for contest enrollment, question display, answer submission, scoring, and leaderboard. Users should be able to browse and enroll in contests, answer contest questions, submit answers, view their scores and rankings, and compare their performance with others on the leaderboard. Specify beige as the base color and saddle brown for all components.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, right? Like, one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring! Anyway, speaking of unpredictable things, have you ever tried to implement an online trivia contest app? I mean, it sounds like a fun way to host knowledge competitions, doesn’t it? You could totally have functionalities for contest enrollment, which is super important, and then there’s the whole question display thing. Oh, and don’t forget about answer submission! I once had a friend who was really into trivia nights, and they would get so competitive about scoring and leaderboards. It’s like, who cares if you win or lose, right? But then again, users should definitely be able to browse and enroll in contests, just like how I browse through my favorite recipes. Speaking of which, I had this amazing dinner last night! Anyway, back to trivia—imagine if you could view your scores and rankings, and compare your performance with others on the leaderboard. That would be so cool! And by the way, I think beige would be a nice base color for the app, and saddle brown for all the components, but honestly, I just can’t stop thinking about what to make for dinner tonight!

instruction: Create a vibrant space for a trivia contest where minds come alive in a dance of knowledge. Let the atmosphere be warm and inviting, like the soft embrace of a sandy shore, complemented by the rich earthiness of a rustic landscape.

instruction: Please implement an online trivia contest app for hosting knowledge competitions. ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a baseball simulation website for simulating baseball games and managing baseball teams. The website should have functionalities for player statistics tracking, team management, and live game simulation. Users should also be able to adjust team strategies and lineups based on their management decisions. Apply floral white for the layout background and dark goldenrod for interactive elements.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny, and the next it's pouring rain. Speaking of rain, did you hear about that baseball simulation website that someone was trying to put together? It’s supposed to be all about simulating baseball games, which sounds fun, right? I mean, imagine managing baseball teams and tracking player statistics while you’re sipping on your coffee. Oh, and I had this amazing dinner last night, totally off-topic, but it was just delightful! Anyway, back to the website, users should really be able to view detailed player stats, manage team rosters, and even keep an eye on finances. It’s like a whole world of baseball right at your fingertips! And can you believe how competitive things are getting? I heard some people are adjusting their team strategies and lineups based on their management decisions, which is just wild. By the way, I think a floral white background would be nice for the layout, and dark goldenrod for those interactive elements would really pop! But honestly, I just hope it doesn’t rain tomorrow; I was planning to go out and enjoy the day.

instruction: Please implement a baseball simulation website for simulating baseball games and managing baseball teams. The website should have functionalities for player statistics tracking, team management, and live game simulation. Users should be able to view detailed player statistics, manage team rosters and finances, simulate games, and view the results. Users should also be able to adjust team strategies and lineups based on their management decisions. Apply a vibrant neon green for the layout background and a pitch black for interactive elements.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a 2048 game website for users to play the 2048 game. The website should have functionalities for starting a new game, moving tiles, merging tiles, game over, and reviving. Users should be able to start a new game, move tiles up, down, left, or right, merge identical tiles, and win the game by achieving the 2048 result. If the game is over, users can choose to revive and continue playing. Choose linen for the background; set all component colors to maroon.

evaluation_checklist.question: Start a New Game
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: A new game board is initialized with two randomly placed tiles, typically 2s or 4s, and the score is reset to zero.

evaluation_checklist.question: Move Tiles Up
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: All tiles should slide upward to fill available space, and if two tiles of the same value collide, they merge into a single tile with the combined value. Check that the board updates correctly and a new tile (2 or 4) appears in an empty spot.

evaluation_checklist.question: Move Tiles Down
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: All tiles should slide downward to fill available space, and if two tiles of the same value collide, they merge into a single tile with the combined value. Confirm that the board updates correctly and a new tile (2 or 4) appears in an empty spot.

evaluation_checklist.question: Move Tiles Left
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: All tiles should slide to the left to fill available space, and if two tiles of the same value collide, they merge into one tile with the combined value. Ensure the board updates correctly and a new tile (2 or 4) appears in an empty spot.

evaluation_checklist.question: Move Tiles Right
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: All tiles should slide to the right to fill available space, and if two tiles of the same value collide, they merge into one tile with the combined value. Verify the board updates correctly and a new tile (2 or 4) appears in an empty spot.

evaluation_checklist.question: Trigger Game Over
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: When no valid moves are possible, a game over message or notification should be displayed, providing an option for the user to revive or continue the game.

evaluation_checklist.question: Revive the Game After Game Over
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Playing should resume with the board in the same state as before the game over, with additions of new tiles as per usual move rules, and a revived notification or acknowledgment should be shown.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'linen' as the background color and 'maroon' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring! Anyway, speaking of unpredictability, have you ever tried to play that 2048 game? It’s kind of like a puzzle, right? So, if you were to, like, create a website for it, you’d want to make sure it’s super easy for users to dive right in and start a new game, you know? I mean, who wants to deal with complicated stuff when they just want to merge some tiles and maybe complain about how their dinner didn’t turn out as expected? Oh, and don’t forget to let them move those tiles around – up, down, left, or right – just like how I move around my thoughts when I’m trying to decide what to cook! And if they happen to lose, they should definitely have the option to revive the game, like how I wish I could revive my old favorite TV shows! Also, I heard that maroon is such a nice color, maybe you could use that for the components, but linen for the background would really give it that cozy feel, don’t you think? Anyway, I hope you’re having a great day, and maybe think about how nice it would be to have a game like this to unwind after a long day!

instruction: Please implement a 2048 game website for users to play the 2048 game. The website should have functionalities for starting a new game, moving tiles, merging tiles, game over, and reviving. Users should be able to start a new game, move tiles up, down, left, or right, merge identical tiles, and win the game by achieving the 2048 result. ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a website for a solar company to display company information and products. The website should have functionalities for company introduction, product showcase, news updates, and contact us. Users should be able to browse the company's history, mission, and values, view detailed product information, learn about the company's latest news and events, and contact the company through the contact page with name, email and message. Use lemon chiffon in the background layer and chocolate for the component layer.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the "Company Introduction" page.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The page should display sections for company history, mission, and values. The information should be relevant and correctly reflect the solar company’s background and goals.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the "Product Showcase" page and select the first product.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Detailed product information, including specifications and images, should be accurately displayed. Content should be clear and match the company's product line.

evaluation_checklist.question: Access the "News and Updates" section on the website.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Latest news articles and event updates related to the company should be listed in reverse chronological order, with correct dates and comprehensive details.

evaluation_checklist.question: Fill in and submit the "Contact Us" form with valid details (e.g., name, email, message).
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Form submission should succeed without errors, and a confirmation message should appear to acknowledge receipt.

evaluation_checklist.question: Use the website’s main navigation menu to move and return the homepage between the "Company Introduction," "Product Showcase," "News," and "Contact Us" pages .
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Navigation should be smooth, with each menu link leading to the correct page without broken links or errors.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring! Anyway, speaking of sunny days, I was chatting with a friend about this solar company that really needs a website. They should totally showcase their products and company info, right? I mean, imagine if they had a nice introduction about their history and mission, like how they started from scratch and now they’re all about renewable energy. And oh, did you hear about that new café that opened up? They have the best chocolate desserts! But back to the solar company, they should definitely have a section for news updates too, like the latest trends in solar energy or maybe a feature on their latest projects. And of course, they need a contact page where people can reach out with their name, email, and message. Speaking of names, I can’t remember if I told you about my neighbor’s dog, it’s such a handful! Anyway, they should use lemon chiffon for the background, it’s such a lovely color, and chocolate for the components, it would really pop!

instruction: Please implement a website for a solar company to display company information and products. The website should have functionalities for company introduction, product showcase, news updates, and contact us. Users should be able to browse the company's history, mission, and values, view detailed product information, learn about the company's latest news and events, and contact the company through the contact page with name, email and message. ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a house cleaning service website that provides cleaning services. The website should have functionalities for booking services, service inquiry, and contact us. Users should be able to browse the website, understand the details of the cleaning services, book cleaning services, check service status, and contact customer service staff by phone number and email address. Set the background to azure mist, and apply dark slate blue to components.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the homepage and verify the presence of main navigation links (Home, Services, Book Now, Contact Us).
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: All navigation links are present and correctly labeled, facilitating easy access to different sections of the website.

evaluation_checklist.question: Click on the "Services" link and ensure all available cleaning services are listed with descriptions.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: A comprehensive list of cleaning services is displayed, each accompanied by a clear and accurate description.

evaluation_checklist.question: Access the "Book Now" page and successfully submit a booking form with all required fields completed (e.g., service type, date, customer details).
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The form is submitted without errors, and a confirmation message is displayed indicating a successful booking.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the "Contact Us" page and check that contact information is provided, including a phone number and email address.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The page displays accurate contact details, allowing users to reach out for support.

evaluation_checklist.question: From the homepage, use the navigation to access the service status feature and input a booking reference to check its status.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The service status related to the entered booking reference is displayed clearly, providing users with current information.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'azure mist' as the background color and 'dark slate blue' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how messy my living room is right now, like, I spilled coffee on the couch again, and it got me wondering if I should finally hire someone to clean it up. Speaking of cleaning, have you ever thought about how important it is to have a good house cleaning service website? I mean, they should really have all these functionalities like booking services and inquiries, right? And, oh, the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny, and the next it’s pouring rain! Anyway, back to the website, users should totally be able to browse and understand the details of the cleaning services offered. It would be super helpful if they could book cleaning services directly and maybe even check their service status online. Oh, and don’t forget about contacting customer service staff; they should definitely have a phone number and email for that! By the way, I had this amazing dinner last night, and it made me think about how I need to keep my kitchen clean too! Also, I think a nice background color like azure mist would really brighten up the site, and dark slate blue for the components would be such a classy touch.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately. I mean, one minute it’s sunny, and the next it’s pouring rain. Speaking of unpredictability, have you heard about that software solutions website? It’s supposed to provide information to prospective customers, which is really cool. I was chatting with a friend over dinner the other night, and they were saying how important it is for small to medium-sized businesses to have a good online presence. You know, like having content that introduces software solutions and staffing businesses. It’s all about attracting attention, right? And let’s not forget about those customer cases and success stories—everyone loves a good success story! But honestly, I can’t stop thinking about what to make for dinner tonight. Anyway, I heard there are some interesting industry news and trends out there, but I just can’t seem to focus with all this noise around. Oh, and I think it’s essential for users to be able to browse the website easily, search for relevant information, and contact the owner for more info. By the way, did you see the latest on our competitors? They’re really trying hard with their backgrounds and components. I mean, misty rose and firebrick? Who even thinks of that? It’s just wild!

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny and the next it's pouring rain, and it really makes you wonder what’s going on with the climate these days. Anyway, speaking of unpredictability, have you ever noticed how some people just can’t seem to get their promotions right? It's like they throw everything at the wall and hope something sticks! So, imagine if we could create a community website where people could share their amazing deals and discounts, right? I mean, it should totally have functionalities for browsing promotions, sharing promotions, and searching for promotions, because who doesn’t love a good deal? And you know, users should definitely be able to browse and share those promotions, and search for the ones that really catch their interest. Oh, and let’s not forget about the backend management part! It’s super important to manage users, promotions, and website settings effectively. By the way, I had this delicious dinner last night, it was just perfect! Anyway, back to the website, it should probably use ivory for the outer layout and forest green for those nice UI blocks, but honestly, who even pays attention to colors when there are so many juicy stories to share?

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain, which totally reminds me of that fishing contest I heard about last week. Anyway, you should really think about creating a website for that fishing contest, you know? It would be great to have a place where people can post announcements about the contests, like when they’re happening and all that. Oh, and don’t forget to showcase some of those contest photos, right? I mean, it’s always nice to see who caught the biggest fish! By the way, did you hear about that guy who caught a 20-pound bass? Crazy! Users should definitely be able to browse all the contest information, and it would be super helpful if they could register for the contests too. Maybe make the background mint cream or something? Teal elements could really pop against that! And, of course, displaying the contest results is a must, but honestly, I can’t stop thinking about what to have for dinner tonight. Maybe some grilled fish?

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a fishing contest website to manage and display fishing contest information. The website should have functionalities for posting contest announcements, displaying contest results, and showcasing contest photos. Users should be able to browse contest information, register for contests, and view contest results. Set primary background to mint cream and elements to teal.

instruction: Please implement a fishing contest website to manage and display fishing contest information. The website should have functionalities for posting contest announcements, displaying contest results, and showcasing contest photos. Users should be able to browse contest information, register for contests, and view contest results, all while having a primary background of mint cream and elements that are completely transparent.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a forum webpage with multiple features. The forum webpage should have functionalities for posting, replying, searching, and browsing by category. Users should be able to browse and search for posts, create new posts, reply to others' posts, and browse posts by category. The forum should also have a user center where users can view their own posts, reply records, and personal information. Choose ghost white for global background and slate gray for all components.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test posting a new forum topic as a user.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The post is successfully created and visible in the list of posts on the homepage and within its specific category.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the reply functionality by responding to an existing post.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The reply appears directly under the original post in chronological order, and a confirmation is shown after submission.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the search feature by entering a specific keyword like health.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Search results page displays posts containing the health keyword, and results are relevant to the query.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test browsing posts by selecting a specific category.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user is directed to a list of posts belonging to the chosen category, displaying only relevant posts.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify content accuracy by checking the user center to view personal posts and replies.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user's own posts and reply records are correctly displayed and match previous submissions.

evaluation_checklist.question: Check the user center for correctness of displayed personal information.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Personal user information matches the data provided at registration and any subsequent user edits.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'ghost white' as the background color and 'slate gray' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'ghost white' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'slate gray', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, right? Like, one minute it’s sunny, and the next it’s pouring! Anyway, speaking of unpredictability, have you ever tried implementing a forum webpage? You know, those things where people can post their thoughts and maybe complain about their day? It’s like, you could have all these functionalities, like posting and replying, which is super important. Oh, and searching! I mean, who doesn’t love a good search function? I was at dinner last night, and we were talking about how nice it would be to browse by category, like, “What’s the best pasta recipe?” or “How to deal with annoying competitors.” And don’t forget the user center! That’s where you can view your own posts and reply records, which is kind of like keeping a diary, right? By the way, I think ghost white would be a lovely choice for the background, and slate gray for all the components, just to keep it classy. But honestly, have you seen the latest gossip about that new restaurant? It’s all over the place!

instruction: Create a vibrant space for conversation where ideas can flourish. This forum should be a canvas for sharing thoughts, allowing users to express themselves freely and connect with others. Imagine a serene backdrop, reminiscent of a gentle morning mist, enveloping the entire experience. Each section should feel like a cozy nook, inviting users to dive into discussions, explore various themes, and contribute their voices. Users should have the freedom to discover and engage with posts, craft their own narratives, and respond to the musings of others. Additionally, there should be a personal sanctuary for each user, a place to reflect on their contributions and interactions, where their unique journey is celebrated.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a forum webpage with multiple features. The forum webpage should have functionalities for posting, replying, searching, and browsing by category. Users should be able to browse and search for posts, create new posts, reply to others' posts, and browse posts by category. The forum should also have a user center where users can view their own posts, reply records, and personal information. Choose ghost white for global background and slate gray for all components.
